def find_product_by_sku(products: list[dict], sku: str) -> dict | None:
    for product in products:
        if product["sku"] == sku:
            return product
    return None


def match_orders_to_products(orders: list[dict], products: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        for item in order["items"]:
            product = find_product_by_sku(products, item["sku"])
            if product:
                results.append({"order_id": order["id"], "product": product, "qty": item["qty"]})
    return results


def find_user_by_id(users: list[dict], user_id: int) -> dict | None:
    for user in users:
        if user["id"] == user_id:
            return user
    return None


def build_report(events: list[dict], users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    report = []
    for event in events:
        user = find_user_by_id(users, event["user_id"])
        if user:
            report.append({"event": event["type"], "user": user["name"]})
    return report
